doc-reinforce.description: Reinforce the current document draft without rewriting it from scratch.

doc-confirm.description: Generate a human review checklist to decide whether the current document can be treated as confirmed.

doc-history-save.description: Generate a history preview that records the document change context and next entry point.

session-start.description: Recover the current session state and summarize focus, next entry point, and change boundaries without modifying files.
